headline: ZIM vs JBHT: Which Transportation Stock Wins for Investors?
summary: ZIM Integrated Shipping Services (NYSE:ZIM) and J.B. Hunt Transport Services (NASDAQ:JBHT) both just reported Q4 2025 earnings, and the contrast could not be sharper. One is a volatile ocean carrier navigating a freight rate collapse while a $35-per-share buyout hangs overhead. The other is a disciplined domestic logistics operator quietly expanding margins in a soft ... ZIM vs JBHT: Which Transportation Stock Wins for Investors?
